name: Gargoyle Sorceress
tips: 20/50 for 5 mana is already a wall. Placement matters — drop her one row in front of a Dark ranged ally and the DM buffs triple.
Best pair: a Dark ranged minion (Range > 0, Element Dark) sitting behind her in the same column — e.g. a Grave Caller or a promoted Erebus line.
Without the placement condition you still get +DM/+DM. With it you get +3×DM/+3×DM. At DM=5 that's +15/+15 vs +5/+5.
The 2-card discard cost is 'any' tribe — dump cards you can't play this turn rather than sitting on them.
Discarding Dark Matter Stash triggers its on-Discard +1 DM to ally Mages — including the Sorceress, so you gain the DM right as she's summoned.
rulings: The placement condition checks the tile directly in front of her (one row toward the opponent's back row) at Summon time.
condition_multiplier applies to the scaled amount: base 0 + DM stacks = N, then N × 3 = final buff.
Both buffs (atk and hp) share the same placement condition — either both triple or neither triples.
Discarded cards go to the Exhaust pile, not the Graveyard. Cost-discards fire on-Discard triggers (e.g. Dark Matter Stash's DM grant).
